title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning
summary_desc: The DeepSeek-R1 study presents a novel approach to elevating the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs) through reinforcement learning without relying on human-annotated demonstrations. By implementing an RL framework, it enables LLMs to develop sophisticated self-reflective and adaptable strategies for complex tasks traditionally challenging due to their verifiable nature in domains like mathematics and coding competitions. DeepSeek-R1 not only achieves superior performance over models trained with conventional methods but also enhances smaller language models' reasoning skills through systematic harnessing of emergent patterns learned by the larger model, marking a significant advancement for AI reasoning abilities in STEM fields and beyond.
